title: RAT v3 plugin manifest — kind: audit-log (rat/1)
description: Per-kind manifest schema for `kind: audit-log` (ADR-011). Composes the kind-agnostic envelope (plugin.v1.json) via `allOf` and adds the per-kind constraints: `kind` is fixed to "audit-log", and `provides` MUST contain this kind's minimal mandatory core (`rat://auditlog/v1/append`). The `auditlog` axis defines no further capabilities. NOTE: the capability-URI axis segment `auditlog` differs from the kind name `audit-log`.
$comment: Layered per ADR-011. Strictness = minimal mandatory core (NOT all capabilities): negotiation means a plugin implements a subset. The orchestrating core that ENFORCES `provides` at runtime (C5) is not built yet (Phase 1) — see plugin.v1.json $comment.
